## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content strategy, product updates, and performance metrics for Hotel Engine's marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/L4c5yE54PZ8Ydz9mtQQYDyswqMbmdgP6?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content creation needs careful alignment between business travel and group booking features to avoid confusion](https://fathom.video/share/L4c5yE54PZ8Ydz9mtQQYDyswqMbmdgP6?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)
  - [AI-generated search is impacting traditional search, with Hotel Engine showing strong engagement in chat sessions](https://fathom.video/share/L4c5yE54PZ8Ydz9mtQQYDyswqMbmdgP6?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [Focus on creating specific, high-value content for business travelers to improve conversion rates from AI search results](https://fathom.video/share/L4c5yE54PZ8Ydz9mtQQYDyswqMbmdgP6?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [Implementation of FAQ schema on Webflow site to be coordinated between Hotel Engine and GrowthX teams](https://fathom.video/share/L4c5yE54PZ8Ydz9mtQQYDyswqMbmdgP6?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Alignment

  - [Confusion arose between business travel and group booking features in content](https://fathom.video/share/L4c5yE54PZ8Ydz9mtQQYDyswqMbmdgP6?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)
  - [Cole Parker clarified differences between platform capabilities and group bookings](https://fathom.video/share/L4c5yE54PZ8Ydz9mtQQYDyswqMbmdgP6?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Team to focus on scenario-based or outcome-based content to differentiate offerings](https://fathom.video/share/L4c5yE54PZ8Ydz9mtQQYDyswqMbmdgP6?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [GrowthX to review content artifacts and clearly delineate feature applicability](https://fathom.video/share/L4c5yE54PZ8Ydz9mtQQYDyswqMbmdgP6?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)

### AI Search Performance

  - [Nearly 700 ChatGPT sessions with strong engagement in the last month](https://fathom.video/share/L4c5yE54PZ8Ydz9mtQQYDyswqMbmdgP6?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [High engagement on industry-specific content, particularly construction-related](https://fathom.video/share/L4c5yE54PZ8Ydz9mtQQYDyswqMbmdgP6?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [8.21% conversion rate on signups for wedding content, indicating B2C potential](https://fathom.video/share/L4c5yE54PZ8Ydz9mtQQYDyswqMbmdgP6?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Need to improve Hotel Engine's presence in AI-generated answers (currently 26%)](https://fathom.video/share/L4c5yE54PZ8Ydz9mtQQYDyswqMbmdgP6?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)

### Product Updates

  - [Joel to share Nginx prototype for new landing page soon](https://fathom.video/share/L4c5yE54PZ8Ydz9mtQQYDyswqMbmdgP6?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
  - [Public launch planned for January, allowing time for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/L4c5yE54PZ8Ydz9mtQQYDyswqMbmdgP6?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Barry (internal team member) creating interactive SEO content; potential for collaboration with GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/L4c5yE54PZ8Ydz9mtQQYDyswqMbmdgP6?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [Generative search impacting traditional search, but Hotel Engine showing strong presence](https://fathom.video/share/L4c5yE54PZ8Ydz9mtQQYDyswqMbmdgP6?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [ChatGPT has highest number of sessions, but other platforms (Gemini, Claude) show higher engagement rates](https://fathom.video/share/L4c5yE54PZ8Ydz9mtQQYDyswqMbmdgP6?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
  - [Focus shifting towards capturing high-intent users rather than overall volume from AI searches](https://fathom.video/share/L4c5yE54PZ8Ydz9mtQQYDyswqMbmdgP6?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

### FAQ Schema Implementation

  - [Hotel Engine team to set up schema templates in Webflow collection](https://fathom.video/share/L4c5yE54PZ8Ydz9mtQQYDyswqMbmdgP6?tab=summary&timestamp=1914.0)
  - [GrowthX team to create content in the required format for schema population](https://fathom.video/share/L4c5yE54PZ8Ydz9mtQQYDyswqMbmdgP6?tab=summary&timestamp=1945.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to provide alternative kickoff date options for the upcoming sprint](https://fathom.video/share/L4c5yE54PZ8Ydz9mtQQYDyswqMbmdgP6?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
  - [Carrie to review content planned during strategy sprint and ensure alignment with new focus](https://fathom.video/share/L4c5yE54PZ8Ydz9mtQQYDyswqMbmdgP6?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
  - [Joel to share Nginx prototype for new landing page](https://fathom.video/share/L4c5yE54PZ8Ydz9mtQQYDyswqMbmdgP6?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
  - [Implement FAQ schema on Webflow site (Hotel Engine to set up, GrowthX to populate)](https://fathom.video/share/L4c5yE54PZ8Ydz9mtQQYDyswqMbmdgP6?tab=summary&timestamp=1914.0)
  - [Continue refining content strategy to focus on specific use cases and product features](https://fathom.video/share/L4c5yE54PZ8Ydz9mtQQYDyswqMbmdgP6?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Explore ways to improve fact-checking and product detail accuracy in content](https://fathom.video/share/L4c5yE54PZ8Ydz9mtQQYDyswqMbmdgP6?tab=summary&timestamp=1817.0)
